commit.message: [FLINK-25155] Support claim mode in rest api
[FLINK-25155] Support claim mode in rest api

[FLINK-24086][checkpoint] Rebuild SharedStateRegistry only when the restore method is called for the first time

From FLINK-22483, the CompletedCheckpointStore will not change during task failover.
So we only need to rebuild the SharedStateRegistry once, which can reduce the recovery time during failover.
